message:
test(search): add 48 unit tests for parser, filter, fusion, and rerank math (br-2tnl.7.1)

7-section integration test covering cross-module behavior:
- Parser edge cases (sanitize, extract_terms, unicode, special chars)
- Filter composition (active count, importance semantics, all 6 fields)
- Fusion RRF (exact formula, dual-source ranking, determinism, tiebreak, pagination)
- Budget derivation (query class, mode allocation, posterior normalization)
- Candidate preparation (dedup, budget limits, source attribution)
- Explain payload invariants (stages, reason codes, timings, redaction, serde)
- End-to-end pipeline (candidates → fusion → explain)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
